creator: otacilio.neto@bsd.com.br
text:
Created attachment 169798
poudriere build log.

I have compiled and installed webkit-gtk2-2.4.9_2 on Beaglebone black using poudriere. webkit-gtk2 is used for browsers like midori. When I start midori and open sites like www.google.com.br midori crashes. If I open a page stored locally (like midori FAQ) it don't crashes. I have runned GtkLauncher-1 and it crashes also.
